channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Confirmed hantavirus cases linked to suspected cluster rises to 5, WHO says
item.description: The total number of hantavirus cases in the suspected outbreak aboard the cruise ship MV Hondius has risen to five, according to the World Health Orga...

item.title: Ro Khanna says Trump "would have fired" Howard Lutnick if he'd seen his testimony on Epstein
item.description: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick testified Wednesday before the House Oversight Committee about the Jeffrey Epstein investigation. California Democra...

item.title: How much interest will a $150,000 CD account earn now?
item.description: The interest earnings on a CD of this size will be significant (and they'll be available relatively quickly, too).

item.title: Ted Turner, media tycoon who founded CNN, dies at age 87
item.description: Ted Turner built a media empire that included cable channels CNN, TBS and TNT, and he owned the Atlanta Braves for 20 years.
